description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service. Define a single stage called build and a job named build that runs in this stage. In the build job script, run `export TAG=`if [ "$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" == "master" ]; then echo "latest"; else echo $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME ; fi`` then `docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY`, `docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_PATH:$TAG .`, and `docker push $CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_PATH:$TAG`; the job has no caches, artifacts, or special rules and runs on all branches.
